title: eucalyptus fraseri subsp. fraseri
intro: Eucalyptus fraseri subsp. fraseri, also known as Fraser's peppermint gum, is a subspecies of the eucalyptus tree native to Australia. This plant is valued for its aromatic leaves, which contain compounds like eucalyptol, a key component with medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Eucalyptus fraseri subsp. fraseri include decongestant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues and soothing skin irritations. Eucalyptus fraseri subsp. fraseri is commonly used in herbal preparations like essential oils, teas, and salves, which are often used to aid in cold and flu relief, wound healing, and stress management.
